note: TEENAGER stage. A first-part-time-job offer requiring the teen to provide a SIN before the start date — legal_milestone_due. Hand-derived from taxonomy: SIN / first-job paperwork is an administrative milestone with a deadline → legal_milestone_due, surface_only (Hearth never submits identity paperwork on its own). Distinguished from tax_credit_eligibility_change (a benefits change, not an identity milestone).

input.rawContent:
From: hr@maplemart-grocery.ca
Subject: Welcome aboard — paperwork before your first shift

Congratulations on the part-time cashier role! Before the first shift on June 20, please bring a valid Social Insurance Number (SIN). If your teen does not yet have a SIN, they can apply for free through Service Canada. We also need a signed TD1 form on the first day.
